AddLayerVersionPermission.name: AddLayerVersionPermission
AddLayerVersionPermission.description: Grants permission to add permissions to the resource-based policy of a version of an AWS Lambda layer

AddPermission.name: AddPermission
AddPermission.description: Grants permission to give an AWS service or another account permission to use an AWS Lambda function

CheckpointDurableExecution.name: CheckpointDurableExecution
CheckpointDurableExecution.description: Grants permission to save the progress of an AWS Lambda durable execution

CreateAlias.name: CreateAlias
CreateAlias.description: Grants permission to create an alias for a Lambda function version

CreateCapacityProvider.name: CreateCapacityProvider
CreateCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Lambda capacity provider

CreateCodeSigningConfig.name: CreateCodeSigningConfig
CreateCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Lambda code signing config

CreateEventSourceMapping.name: CreateEventSourceMapping
CreateEventSourceMapping.description: Grants permission to create a mapping between an event source and an AWS Lambda function

CreateFunction.name: CreateFunction
CreateFunction.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Lambda function

CreateFunctionUrlConfig.name: CreateFunctionUrlConfig
CreateFunctionUrlConfig.description: Grants permission to create a function url configuration for a Lambda function

DeleteAlias.name: DeleteAlias
DeleteAlias.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Lambda function alias

DeleteCapacityProvider.name: DeleteCapacityProvider
DeleteCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Lambda capacity provider

DeleteCodeSigningConfig.name: DeleteCodeSigningConfig
DeleteCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Lambda code signing config

DeleteEventSourceMapping.name: DeleteEventSourceMapping
DeleteEventSourceMapping.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Lambda event source mapping

DeleteFunction.name: DeleteFunction
DeleteFunction.description: Grants permission to delete an AWS Lambda function

DeleteFunctionCodeSigningConfig.name: DeleteFunctionCodeSigningConfig
DeleteFunctionCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to detach a code signing config from an AWS Lambda function

DeleteFunctionConcurrency.name: DeleteFunctionConcurrency
DeleteFunctionConcurrency.description: Grants permission to remove a concurrent execution limit from an AWS Lambda function

DeleteFunctionEventInvokeConfig.name: DeleteFunctionEventInvokeConfig
DeleteFunctionEventInvokeConfig.description: Grants permission to delete the configuration for asynchronous invocation for an AWS Lambda function, version, or alias

DeleteFunctionUrlConfig.name: DeleteFunctionUrlConfig
DeleteFunctionUrlConfig.description: Grants permission to delete function url configuration for a Lambda function

DeleteLayerVersion.name: DeleteLayerVersion
DeleteLayerVersion.description: Grants permission to delete a version of an AWS Lambda layer

DeleteProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.name: DeleteProvisionedConcurrencyConfig
DeleteProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.description: Grants permission to delete the provisioned concurrency configuration for an AWS Lambda function

DisableReplication.name: DisableReplication
DisableReplication.description: Grants permission to disable replication for a Lambda@Edge function

EnableReplication.name: EnableReplication
EnableReplication.description: Grants permission to enable replication for a Lambda@Edge function

GetAccountSettings.name: GetAccountSettings
GetAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to view details about an account's limits and usage in an AWS Region

GetAlias.name: GetAlias
GetAlias.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Lambda function alias

GetCapacityProvider.name: GetCapacityProvider
GetCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Lambda capacity provider

GetCodeSigningConfig.name: GetCodeSigningConfig
GetCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Lambda code signing config

GetDurableExecution.name: GetDurableExecution
GetDurableExecution.description: Grants permission to view details of an AWS Lambda durable execution

GetDurableExecutionHistory.name: GetDurableExecutionHistory
GetDurableExecutionHistory.description: Grants permission to view execution history of an AWS Lambda durable execution

GetDurableExecutionState.name: GetDurableExecutionState
GetDurableExecutionState.description: Grants permission to view current state of an AWS Lambda durable execution

GetEventSourceMapping.name: GetEventSourceMapping
GetEventSourceMapping.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Lambda event source mapping

GetFunction.name: GetFunction
GetFunction.description: Grants permission to view details about an AWS Lambda function

GetFunctionCodeSigningConfig.name: GetFunctionCodeSigningConfig
GetFunctionCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to view the code signing config arn attached to an AWS Lambda function

GetFunctionConcurrency.name: GetFunctionConcurrency
GetFunctionConcurrency.description: Grants permission to view details about the reserved concurrency configuration for a function

GetFunctionConfiguration.name: GetFunctionConfiguration
GetFunctionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to view details about the version-specific settings of an AWS Lambda function or version

GetFunctionEventInvokeConfig.name: GetFunctionEventInvokeConfig
GetFunctionEventInvokeConfig.description: Grants permission to view the configuration for asynchronous invocation for a function, version, or alias

GetFunctionRecursionConfig.name: GetFunctionRecursionConfig
GetFunctionRecursionConfig.description: Grants permission to view the recursion configuration of an AWS Lambda function

GetFunctionScalingConfig.name: GetFunctionScalingConfig
GetFunctionScalingConfig.description: Grants permission to view the scaling configuration of an AWS Lambda function running on a capacity provider

GetFunctionUrlConfig.name: GetFunctionUrlConfig
GetFunctionUrlConfig.description: Grants permission to read function url configuration for a Lambda function

GetLayerVersion.name: GetLayerVersion
GetLayerVersion.description: Grants permission to view details about a version of an AWS Lambda layer. Note this action also supports GetLayerVersionByArn API

GetLayerVersionPolicy.name: GetLayerVersionPolicy
GetLayerVersionPolicy.description: Grants permission to view the resource-based policy for a version of an AWS Lambda layer

GetPolicy.name: GetPolicy
GetPolicy.description: Grants permission to view the resource-based policy for an AWS Lambda function, version, or alias

GetProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.name: GetProvisionedConcurrencyConfig
GetProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.description: Grants permission to view the provisioned concurrency configuration for an AWS Lambda function's alias or version

GetRuntimeManagementConfig.name: GetRuntimeManagementConfig
GetRuntimeManagementConfig.description: Grants permission to view the runtime management configuration of an AWS Lambda function

InvokeAsync.name: InvokeAsync
InvokeAsync.description: Grants permission to invoke a function asynchronously (Deprecated)

InvokeFunction.name: InvokeFunction
InvokeFunction.description: Grants permission to invoke an AWS Lambda function

InvokeFunctionUrl.name: InvokeFunctionUrl
InvokeFunctionUrl.description: Grants permission to invoke an AWS Lambda function through url

ListAliases.name: ListAliases
ListAliases.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of aliases for an AWS Lambda function

ListCapacityProviders.name: ListCapacityProviders
ListCapacityProviders.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda capacity providers

ListCodeSigningConfigs.name: ListCodeSigningConfigs
ListCodeSigningConfigs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda code signing configs

ListDurableExecutionsByFunction.name: ListDurableExecutionsByFunction
ListDurableExecutionsByFunction.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda durable executions of an AWS Lambda function

ListEventSourceMappings.name: ListEventSourceMappings
ListEventSourceMappings.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda event source mappings

ListFunctionEventInvokeConfigs.name: ListFunctionEventInvokeConfigs
ListFunctionEventInvokeConfigs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of configurations for asynchronous invocation for a function

ListFunctionUrlConfigs.name: ListFunctionUrlConfigs
ListFunctionUrlConfigs.description: Grants permission to read function url configurations for a function

ListFunctionVersionsByCapacityProvider.name: ListFunctionVersionsByCapacityProvider
ListFunctionVersionsByCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda function versions by the capacity provider assigned

ListFunctions.name: ListFunctions
ListFunctions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda functions, with the version-specific configuration of each function

ListFunctionsByCodeSigningConfig.name: ListFunctionsByCodeSigningConfig
ListFunctionsByCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda functions by the code signing config assigned

ListLayerVersions.name: ListLayerVersions
ListLayerVersions.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of versions of an AWS Lambda layer

ListLayers.name: ListLayers
ListLayers.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of AWS Lambda layers, with details about the latest version of each layer

ListProvisionedConcurrencyConfigs.name: ListProvisionedConcurrencyConfigs
ListProvisionedConcurrencyConfigs.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of provisioned concurrency configurations for an AWS Lambda function

ListTags.name: ListTags
ListTags.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of tags for an AWS Lambda function, event source mapping, capacity provider, or code signing configuration resource

ListVersionsByFunction.name: ListVersionsByFunction
ListVersionsByFunction.description: Grants permission to retrieve a list of versions for an AWS Lambda function

PassCapacityProvider.name: PassCapacityProvider
PassCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to pass an AWS Lambda capacity provider to a service

PublishLayerVersion.name: PublishLayerVersion
PublishLayerVersion.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Lambda layer

PublishVersion.name: PublishVersion
PublishVersion.description: Grants permission to create an AWS Lambda function version

PutFunctionCodeSigningConfig.name: PutFunctionCodeSigningConfig
PutFunctionCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to attach a code signing config to an AWS Lambda function

PutFunctionConcurrency.name: PutFunctionConcurrency
PutFunctionConcurrency.description: Grants permission to configure reserved concurrency for an AWS Lambda function

PutFunctionEventInvokeConfig.name: PutFunctionEventInvokeConfig
PutFunctionEventInvokeConfig.description: Grants permission to configures options for asynchronous invocation on an AWS Lambda function, version, or alias

PutFunctionRecursionConfig.name: PutFunctionRecursionConfig
PutFunctionRecursionConfig.description: Grants permission to update the recursion configuration of an AWS Lambda function

PutFunctionScalingConfig.name: PutFunctionScalingConfig
PutFunctionScalingConfig.description: Grants permission to update the scaling configuration of an AWS Lambda function running on a capacity provider

PutProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.name: PutProvisionedConcurrencyConfig
PutProvisionedConcurrencyConfig.description: Grants permission to configure provisioned concurrency for an AWS Lambda function's alias or version

PutRuntimeManagementConfig.name: PutRuntimeManagementConfig
PutRuntimeManagementConfig.description: Grants permission to update the runtime management configuration of an AWS Lambda function

RemoveLayerVersionPermission.name: RemoveLayerVersionPermission
RemoveLayerVersionPermission.description: Grants permission to remove a statement from the permissions policy for a version of an AWS Lambda layer

RemovePermission.name: RemovePermission
RemovePermission.description: Grants permission to revoke function-use permission from an AWS service or another account

SendDurableExecutionCallbackFailure.name: SendDurableExecutionCallbackFailure
SendDurableExecutionCallbackFailure.description: Grants permission to send a failure response for a callback operation in an AWS Lambda durable execution

SendDurableExecutionCallbackHeartbeat.name: SendDurableExecutionCallbackHeartbeat
SendDurableExecutionCallbackHeartbeat.description: Grants permission to send a heartbeat for a callback operation in an AWS Lambda durable execution

SendDurableExecutionCallbackSuccess.name: SendDurableExecutionCallbackSuccess
SendDurableExecutionCallbackSuccess.description: Grants permission to send a successful response for a callback operation in an AWS Lambda durable execution

StopDurableExecution.name: StopDurableExecution
StopDurableExecution.description: Grants permission to stop an AWS Lambda durable execution

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to an AWS Lambda function, event source mapping, capacity provider, or code signing configuration resource

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from an AWS Lambda function, event source mapping, capacity provider, or code signing configuration resource

UpdateAlias.name: UpdateAlias
UpdateAlias.description: Grants permission to update the configuration of an AWS Lambda function's alias

UpdateCapacityProvider.name: UpdateCapacityProvider
UpdateCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Lambda capacity provider

UpdateCodeSigningConfig.name: UpdateCodeSigningConfig
UpdateCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to update an AWS Lambda code signing config

UpdateEventSourceMapping.name: UpdateEventSourceMapping
UpdateEventSourceMapping.description: Grants permission to update the configuration of an AWS Lambda event source mapping

UpdateFunctionCode.name: UpdateFunctionCode
UpdateFunctionCode.description: Grants permission to update the code of an AWS Lambda function

UpdateFunctionCodeSigningConfig.name: UpdateFunctionCodeSigningConfig
UpdateFunctionCodeSigningConfig.description: Grants permission to update the code signing config of an AWS Lambda function

UpdateFunctionConfiguration.name: UpdateFunctionConfiguration
UpdateFunctionConfiguration.description: Grants permission to modify the version-specific settings of an AWS Lambda function

UpdateFunctionEventInvokeConfig.name: UpdateFunctionEventInvokeConfig
UpdateFunctionEventInvokeConfig.description: Grants permission to modify the configuration for asynchronous invocation for an AWS Lambda function, version, or alias

UpdateFunctionUrlConfig.name: UpdateFunctionUrlConfig
UpdateFunctionUrlConfig.description: Grants permission to update a function url configuration for a Lambda function

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}
aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.name: aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}
aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.name: aws:TagKeys
aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

lambda:CodeSigningConfigArn.name: lambda:CodeSigningConfigArn
lambda:CodeSigningConfigArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of an AWS Lambda code signing config

lambda:EventSourceToken.name: lambda:EventSourceToken
lambda:EventSourceToken.description: Filters access by the ID from a non-AWS event source configured for the AWS Lambda function

lambda:FunctionArn.name: lambda:FunctionArn
lambda:FunctionArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of an AWS Lambda function

lambda:FunctionUrlAuthType.name: lambda:FunctionUrlAuthType
lambda:FunctionUrlAuthType.description: Filters access by authorization type specified in request. Available during CreateFunctionUrlConfig, UpdateFunctionUrlConfig, DeleteFunctionUrlConfig, GetFunctionUrlConfig, ListFunctionUrlConfig, AddPermission and RemovePermission operations

lambda:InvokedViaFunctionUrl.name: lambda:InvokedViaFunctionUrl
lambda:InvokedViaFunctionUrl.description: Limits the scope of lambda:InvokeFunction action to Function URLs only. Available during AddPermission operation

lambda:Layer.name: lambda:Layer
lambda:Layer.description: Filters access by the ARN of a version of an AWS Lambda layer

lambda:Principal.name: lambda:Principal
lambda:Principal.description: Filters access by restricting the AWS service or account that can invoke a function

lambda:SecurityGroupIds.name: lambda:SecurityGroupIds
lambda:SecurityGroupIds.description: Filters access by the ID of security groups configured for the AWS Lambda function

lambda:SourceFunctionArn.name: lambda:SourceFunctionArn
lambda:SourceFunctionArn.description: Filters access by the ARN of the AWS Lambda function from which the request originated

lambda:SubnetIds.name: lambda:SubnetIds
lambda:SubnetIds.description: Filters access by the ID of subnets configured for the AWS Lambda function

lambda:VpcIds.name: lambda:VpcIds
lambda:VpcIds.description: Filters access by the ID of the VPC configured for the AWS Lambda function
